title: Are you ok
description: The "Are you ok?" mod adds a creepy entity that stalks and attacks the player. It follows the player secretly and strikes when spotted. The mod creates a tense, horror-filled atmosphere, keeping players on edge throughout the game.
body:
The "Are you ok?" mod plunges the player into a world of constant dread and unease. Every step is a reminder that something is watching, stalking from the shadows. The peaceful Minecraft world is shattered as the entity silently follows, its presence looming with every corner turned. The player is gripped by a relentless tension, never knowing when the attack will come. The game transforms from a safe, explorative adventure into a horrifying survival experience where every moment could be their last. Fear takes control, and the player’s every move becomes a desperate bid for safety.



You think is Herobrine,is NOT HIM
